narrative:
Forest / Jackson (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,241 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
